title: Creamy Colby Pasta Bake
description: A comforting pasta bake filled with a creamy Colby cheese sauce and topped with a crumbly Italian cheese crust.
instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a saucepan, combine heavy cream and shredded Colby cheese.
Bring mixture to a simmer over medium heat, stirring constantly.
Reduce heat to low and let sauce simmer for 2-3 minutes, or until cheese is melted and smooth.
Stir in shredded jack cheese until melted.
In a greased 9x13-inch baking dish, combine cooked pasta and creamy cheese sauce.
Top with crumbled cheese and grated Italian cheese.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until top is golden brown and cheese is melted.
